title: Ecommerce Trends: How Etsy is using AI
text: Etsy is overhauling its search ranking system with generative AI to make results more relevant. The company is creating more diverse and engaging recommendations by scoring items across a very broad range of interests and clustering them to capture nonobvious connections to encourage discovery. Etsy now has smarter search ranking, as well as image-based matching in search. Using AI, Etsy is working to build a customer experience where the first trends and items a user sees is based on their activity, with personalized homepages yielding nearly double the engagement compared to those without personalization. Investments in machine learning have enabled more personalized recommendations, particularly through the app and owned marketing channels, with over 75% of push notifications and emails now personalized. Etsy calls its blend of human and AI-powered recommendations algotorial curation, leveraging these tools to amplify the expertise of their team and create a more personalized experience. Human experts identify trends and select an initial set of approximately 50 listings, then machine learning expands the collection to around 1,000 listings. Etsy has partnered with OpenAI, Google and Microsoft on enabling agentic commerce. Early partnerships with AI platforms like ChatGPT and Microsoft Copilot have produced a fifteenfold increase in agentic traffic year over year.
